title: excoecaria pallida
intro: Excoecaria pallida is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, also known as the poison tree, due to its toxic milky sap. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Excoecaria pallida include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its antimicrobial properties, which can help to prevent infections. Excoecaria pallida is typically prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and is often used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and wounds.
